question:
In each question below are given three
statements 
followed 
by 
two 
conclusions
numbered I and II. You have to take the three
given statements to be true even if they seem
to be at variance with commonly known facts.
Read the statements and then decide which of
the given conclusions logically follows from the
given 
statements, 
disregarding 
commonly
known facts.
Statements:
All Hill are Valley.
A few Valley are Dam.
All Dam are River.
Conclusions:
I. Some River are Hill .
II. No River is Hill

options.text: Only conclusion II follows
options.html: Only conclusion II follows

options.text: Either conclusion I or conclusion II follows
options.html: Either conclusion I or conclusion II follows

options.text: Neither conclusion I nor conclusion II follows
options.html: Neither conclusion I nor conclusion II follows

options.text: Both conclusion I and conclusion II follows
options.html: Both conclusion I and conclusion II follows

explanation:
Conclusion 1: It does not follow. There are no
direct relation given between River and Hill so,
Some River are Hill does not follow.
Conclusion 2: It does not follow. There are no
direct relation given between River and Hill so,
No River is Hill does not follow.
But here either or case occurs.
